name: neruva-record
summary: Auto-record + auto-pilot for Claude Code, Cursor, and other agent harnesses backed by Neruva memory substrate. v0.15 ships a warm daemon with TTL cache: cache-hit p95 ~80ms (faster than Mem0). Pair with @neruva/mcp 0.23+ for the native Rust hook binary. AUTO-PILOT: KG auto-extract on ingest, 18-pattern intent router, reflective self-curation. Plus 8-language code-graph, per-turn recall, secrets redaction.
